skills.name: whoami
skills.title: Who am I
skills.description: Return the signed-in ArabiyaPath user's profile: name, email, preferred dialect, and admin flag.

skills.name: list_courses
skills.title: List courses
skills.description: List ArabiyaPath dialects with their levels and units. Public catalog data.

skills.name: my_progress
skills.title: My learning progress
skills.description: Return the signed-in user's recently completed ArabiyaPath lessons with unit, level, and dialect names.

limit.description: How many recent lessons to return. Defaults to 20.

skills.name: my_purchases
skills.title: My purchases
skills.description: Return the signed-in user's purchases (courses, bundles, memberships) with product scope and status.

skills.name: my_certificates
skills.title: My certificates
skills.description: Return the signed-in user's completion certificates with dialect, level, issue date, and public verification URL.
